meaning: adj.同等的,同等权利的n.同等,同权
examples: Women should be treated as coequal with men in every way.
Eligible certificate and certificate of conformity have coequal effectiveness.
It may be ridiculous to accord Stone's movie a status coequal with the Warren report.
Pulliam was one of the last of a breed of forceful publishers who saw their news and editorial pages as coequal platforms for their political views -- in his case, generally conservative.
